Afghanistan.notes: Visa is not required in case born in Afghanistan or can proof that one of their parents is a national of Afghanistan or born in Afghanistan.. e-Visa: Visitors must arrive at Kabul International (KBL)..

Algeria.notes: Passengers who travel as tourists to cities in the south of Algeria (Timimoun, Ghardaia, Ilizi, Djanet or Tamanraset) can obtain a visa upon arrival for a maximum of 30 days. They must have a return/onward ticket and a hotel reservation confirmation..

Angola.notes: Maximum 3 entries per calendar year. 30 days per trip, but no more than 90 days within any 1 calendar year for tourism purposes only.. Visitors must have a return/onward ticket and a hotel reservation confirmation.. An International Certificate of Vaccination is required..

Benin.notes: Must have an international vaccination certificate.. Three types of electronic visa are offered: the e-Visa valid for 30 days for a single entry (50€), the e-Visa valid for 30 days for several (multiple) entries (75€), and the e-Visa valid for 90 days to make several (multiple) entries (100€).

Bhutan.notes: As part of the visa application process, you will be required to pay the Sustainable Development Fee (SDF) of US$100 per day..

Burundi.notes: From December 2021, passengers of all countries that required visa, can now obtain visa on arrival at Bujumbura International Airport, and all land borders..

Canada.notes: eTA required if arriving by air..

China.notes: Temporarily visa-free from 8 November 2024 to 31 December 2026.. Permanent visa not required to Hainan for 15 days.. 240-hour (10-day) visa-free transit to a third country or region (including Hong Kong SAR, China, Macau SAR, China or Taiwan (Province of China) ) using any mode of transport. Must have a confirmed onward ticket/itinerary, and enter through 1 of 64 approved ports. During which, may freely travel within the 24 provinces permitted for visa-free transit and engage in tourism, business, and visits... 24-hour visa-free transit to a third country or region (including Hong Kong SAR, China, Macau SAR, China, and Taiwan (Province of China)), is available at most international airports, without leaving the airport. Travellers who need to leave the airport may obtain a temporary entry permit from immigration... 5-day port visa (Visa on Arrival) for Shenzhen if arriving at designated ports of entry from Hong Kong SAR, China by land or sea, for stays within Shenzhen.. 3-day port visa (Visa on Arrival) if arriving in Zhuhai or Xiamen at designated ports of entry, for stays within the respective city.. 15-day visa-free entry for cruise ship passengers in tour groups, if arriving at any cruise port along China's coastline, including but not limited to Tianjin; Dalian; Shanghai; Lianyungang; Wenzhou; Zhoushan; Xiamen; Qingdao; Guangzhou; Shenzhen; Beihai; Haikou; Sanya. May further travel inland to all regions of coastal provinces (and equivalents) and Beijing.. May apply for a port visa (Visa on Arrival) if travelling for an urgent, qualified reason. Prior clearance for port visa is highly recommended or may be denied boarding by airlines..

Colombia.notes: 90 days - extendable up to 180-days stay within a 1-year period..

Comoros.notes: Nationals of any country can obtain a visa on arrival for a maximum stay of 45 days. Also, the cost is 30 euros or 50 USD..

Côte d'Ivoire.notes: e-Visa holders must arrive via Port Bouet Airport..

Cuba.notes: The tourist visa is valid for a single entry to Cuba, for a stay of 90 days, extendable for 90 days..

Denmark.stay: Freedom of movement (including Faroe Islands and Greenland )..

Dominican Republic.notes: Can be extended up to 120 days with fee.

Equatorial Guinea.notes: Must arrive via Malabo International Airport, processing fee 75 USD.

Ethiopia.notes: Visa on arrival is obtainable only at Addis Ababa Bole International Airport.. e-Visa holders must arrive via Addis Ababa Bole International Airport.. e-Visa is available for 30 or 90 days..

France.stay: Freedom of movement (in Regions of France ).

Gabon.notes: e-Visa holders must arrive via Libreville International Airport..

India.notes: e-Visa holders must arrive via 32 designated airports or 5 designated seaports.. An Indian e-Tourist Visa may only be obtained twice within 1 calendar year.. Foreigners of Pakistani origin or who hold a Pakistani Passport are not eligible for an e-Visa. Foreigners who are not Pakistani nationals, but whose parents or grandparents (either paternal or maternal) were born in, or were permanent residents in Pakistan, are also not eligible for an e-Visa..

Iran.notes: Passengers who arrive at Kish (KIH) or Qeshm (GSM) do not need a visa for a maximum of 14 days.. Passengers can obtain a visa upon arrival at Mashhad International Airport (MHD), Tabriz International Airport (TBZ), Esfahan International Airport (IFN), Bandar Abbas International Airport (BND) and Shiraz International Airport (SYZ) for a maximum of 30 days..

Jordan.notes: Visa can be obtained upon arrival, it will cost a total of 40 JOD, obtainable at most international ports of entry and land border crossings (except King Hussein/Allenby Bridge )..

Kenya.notes: Applications can be submitted up to 90 days prior to travel and must be submitted at least 3 days in advance.. eTA fee is 32.50 USD.. Proof of reservation at the hotel where visitors plan to stay is required (if staying with friends, an invitation letter is also acceptable).. Yellow fever vaccination certificate is required if coming from endemic countries..

Kiribati.notes: 90 days within any calendar year period.

South Korea.notes: The validity period of a K-ETA is 3 years from the date of approval..

Laos.notes: Visa not required from 1 July to 31 December 2024.. eVisa and Visa on arrival also available.. 18 of the 33 border crossings are only open to regular visa holders.. e-Visa may be used to enter Laos through the Luang Prabang, Pakse and Vientiane international airports, 3 Thai-Lao Friendship Bridges, in Boten (road and railroad ), and in Vientiane (at Khamsavath railway station ).. Visa on arrival is available at the Luang Prabang, Pakse and Vientiane international airports, 4 Thai-Lao Friendship Bridges and 7 border crossings..

Lebanon.notes: Extendable for 2 additional months.. Granted free of charge at Beirut International Airport or any other port of entry if there is no Israeli visa or seal, holding a telephone number, an address in Lebanon, and a non refundable return or circle trip ticket..

Marshall Islands.notes: Visitors wishing to travel to Kwajalein are required to hold an Entry Authorization issued by the United States Military..

Mauritius.notes: 180 days per calendar year for tourism, 120 days per calendar year for business..

Mongolia.notes: The Ministry of Foreign Affairs of Mongolia has exempted visas for 34 countries from January 2023 to December 2025..

Mozambique.notes: Travelers must register on the e-Visa platform at least 48 hours prior to travel and pay a processing fee of 650 MT..

Myanmar.notes: e-Visa holders must arrive via Yangon, Nay Pyi Taw or Mandalay airports or via land border crossings with Thailand — Tachileik, Myawaddy and Kawthaung or India — Rih Khaw Dar and Tamu.. e-Visa available for both tourism (allowed stay is 28 days) or business (allowed stay is 70 days) purposes..

New Zealand.notes: International Visitor Conservation and Tourism Levy must be paid upon requesting an Electronic Travel Authority.. Holders of an Australian Permanent Resident Visa or Resident Return Visa may be granted a New Zealand Resident Visa on arrival permitting indefinite stay (pursuant to the Trans-Tasman Travel Arrangement ), subject to meeting character requirements and obtaining an Electronic Travel Authority prior to departure. Such travellers are not required to pay the International Visitor Conservation and Tourism Levy..

Pakistan.notes: Issued free of charge as of August 2024..

Papua New Guinea.notes: Free visa valid for 60 days (extension is possible for a fee) on arrival at Port Moresby or Tokua (Rabaul)..

Sierra Leone.notes: It is valid for only for one month but can be extended at the immigration department once in-country..

South Sudan.notes: Obtainable online, 90 days for 200 USD and 180 days for 350 USD.. Printed visa authorization must be presented at the time of travel..

Suriname.notes: An entrance fee of USD 50 or EUR 50 must be paid online prior to arrival.. Multiple entry e-Visa is also available..

Tajikistan.notes: Visa also available online.. e-Visa holders can enter through all border points..

Uganda.notes: Determined at the port of entry.. Must apply online at least 2 business days prior to travel. As of March 2017, airlines may deny passengers permission to board flights to Uganda without proof that they had successfully applied for an e-Visa. Ugandan immigration authorities may require additional documentation, including proof of a return plane ticket and detailed tour itinerary in Uganda.. International Certificate of Vaccination required..

United States.notes: ESTA is valid for 2 years from the date of issuance.. ESTA is also required when entering the country by cruise ship or land.. A Form I-94 is required for entry into the United States by land. It carries a $30 fee and can be obtained either online or upon arrival.. Visa required for nationals of VWP countries who have travelled or been present in Iran, Iraq, Libya, North Korea, Somalia, Sudan, Syria or Yemen at any time on or after 1 March 2011 or Cuba at any time on or after 12 January 2021, or nationals of VWP countries who are also nationals of Iran, Iraq, North Korea, Sudan or Syria. Exceptions apply if the travel was in military or diplomatic service of the VWP country..

Vietnam.notes: Extended visas available at the following airports: Ho Chi Minh City, Hanoi, Phu Quoc, or Danang.. A single entry eVisa valid for 90 days is also available.. 30 day visa exemption at Phu Quoc Island..

Zambia.notes: Also eligible for a universal visa allowing access to Zimbabwe..

Zimbabwe.notes: Also eligible for a universal visa allowing access to Zambia..

Abkhazia.stay: Tourists from all countries (except Georgia) can visit Abkhazia for a period not exceeding 24 hours as part of an organized tourist group.

Mount Athos.stay: Special permit required (4 days: 25 euro for Orthodox visitors, 35 euro for non-Orthodox visitors, 18 euro for students). There is a visitors' quota: maximum 100 Orthodox and 10 non-Orthodox per day and women are not allowed.

UN Buffer Zone in Cyprus.stay: Access Permit is required for travelling inside the zone, except Civil Use Areas.

Jan Mayen.stay: Unlimited, Norwegian citizens may live and work freely

Svalbard.stay: Unlimited, Norwegian citizens may live and work freely

South Ossetia.stay: Multiple entry visa to Russia and three-day prior notification are required to enter South Ossetia.

Eritrea outside Asmara.stay: To travel in the rest of the country, a Travel Permit for Foreigners is required (20 Eritrean nakfa ).

Saint Helena.stay: Visitor's Pass granted on arrival valid for 4/10/21/60/90 days for 12/14/16/20/25 pound sterling.

Tristan da Cunha.stay: Permission to land required for 15/30 pounds sterling (yacht/ship passenger) for Tristan da Cunha Island or 20 pounds sterling for Gough Island, Inaccessible Island or Nightingale Islands.

Somaliland.stay: 30 days for 30 US dollars, payable on arrival.

Sudan outside Khartoum.stay: All foreigners traveling more than 25 kilometers outside of Khartoum must obtain a travel permit.

India PAP/RAP.stay: Protected Area Permit (PAP) required for whole states of Nagaland and Sikkim, and parts of states Manipur, Arunachal Pradesh, Uttarakhand, Jammu and Kashmir, Rajasthan, Himachal Pradesh.. Restricted Area Permit (RAP) required for all of Andaman and Nicobar Islands and parts of Sikkim. Some of these requirements are occasionally lifted for a year..

Iraqi Kurdistan.stay: You can apply for an e-Visa (30 days) to visit the Iraqi Kurdistan Region.

Baikonur & Priozersk.stay: Special permission required for the town of Baikonur and surrounding areas in Kyzylorda Oblast, and the town of Gvardeyskiy near Almaty.

Kish Island.stay: Visitors to Kish Island do not require a visa.

Sabah and Sarawak.stay: These states have their own immigration authorities and passport is required to travel to them, however the same visa applies.

Maldives outside Malé.stay: Tourists are generally prohibited from visiting non-resort islands without the express permission of the Government of Maldives.

North Korea outside Pyongyang.stay: People are not allowed to leave the capital city, tourists can only leave the capital with a governmental tourist guide (no independent moving)

Palestine.stay: Arrival by sea to Gaza Strip not allowed.

Gorno-Badakhshan Autonomous Province.stay: OIVR permit required (15+5 Tajikistani Somoni ) and another special permit (free of charge) is required for Lake Sarez.

Tibet Autonomous Region.stay: Tibet Travel Permit required (10 US Dollars ).

Yemen outside Sanaa or Aden.stay: Special permission needed for travel outside Sanaa or Aden.

Bermuda.stay: Up to 6 months; Decided on arrival.

French West Indies.stay: ID card valid. French West Indies refers to Martinique, Guadeloupe, Saint Martin and Saint Barthélemy..

Puerto Rico.stay: Visa not required under the Visa Waiver Program, for 90 days on arrival from overseas for 2 years. ESTA required.

U.S. Virgin Islands.stay: Visa not required under the Visa Waiver Program, for 90 days on arrival from overseas for 2 years. ESTA required.

Galápagos.stay: Online pre-registration is required. Transit Control Card must also be obtained at the airport prior to departure.

Macquarie Island.stay: A written authorisation of the Director of National Parks and Wildlife is required.

Tokelau.stay: 10 days/3 months/1 year. Visitors permits/Residence permits/Work permits/Special permits granted, allow the permit holder to be in Tokelau, for up to 10 days/3 months/1 year, unless otherwise specified. Apply for a travel permit at the Tokelau office in Apia, Samoa, at least 2 weeks prior to travel. Visitors are required to hold proof of sufficient funds to cover their stay.. The amount of funds needed is NZD 1,000 - per person per month of stay or NZD 400 - if accommodation. Tokelau can only be reached by boat from Samoa, and a permit from the Samoan Immigration Authorities is required to leave and re-enter Samoa..

Christmas Island.stay: 90 days; Passports and visas are not required when travelling from the Australian mainland. However, photographic identification must be produced for clearance through Customs and Immigration. Normal Australian Customs and Immigration procedures apply when entry is made from outside Australia.

Cocos (Keeling) Islands.stay: 90 days; Passports and visas are not required when travelling from the Australian mainland. However, photographic identification must be produced for clearance through Customs and Immigration. Normal Australian Customs and Immigration procedures apply when entry is made from outside Australia.

Pitcairn Islands.stay: 14 days visa free and landing fee 35 USD or tax of 5 USD if not going ashore.

United States Minor Outlying Islands.stay: Special permits required for Midway Atoll, Wake Island, Johnston Atoll, Kingman Reef, Palmyra Atoll, Howland Island, Baker Island, Jarvis Island, and Navassa Island.

Falkland Islands.stay: A visitor permit is normally issued as a stamp in the passport on arrival, The maximum validity period is 1 month.

South Georgia and the South Sandwich Isl.stay: Pre-arrival permit from the Commissioner required (72 hours/1 month for 110/160 pounds sterling ).

Antarctica.stay: Special permits required for British Antarctic Territory, French Southern and Antarctic Lands, Argentine Antarctica, Australian Antarctic Territory, Bouvet Island, Chilean Antarctic Territory, Heard Island and McDonald Islands, Peter I Island, Queen Maud Land, Ross Dependency.
